title: hieracium subramosum subsp. compsophyllum
intro: Hieracium subramosum subsp. compsophyllum, also known as the Hieracium, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are derived from its sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Hieracium subramosum subsp. compsophyllum are thought to include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant is typically used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential benefits and uses.
